name: checkbox
description: Animated checkbox with checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states, label, description, and disabled support.

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether the checkbox is in the checked state

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Callback invoked with the new checked value when the user presses the checkbox

props.name: label
props.description: Primary text label rendered beside the checkbox

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary descriptive text rendered below the label

props.name: children
props.description: Custom label content; overrides label and description when provided

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction and applies disabled styling

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Shows an indeterminate dash instead of the check mark

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the outer Pressable container

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Accessibility label; defaults to the label prop

props.name: accessibilityHint
props.description: Accessibility hint describing what happens when the checkbox is pressed

examples.label: Example 1
Example 2
Example 3
Example 4
examples.code:
// Custom children instead of label/description
<Checkbox checked={agreed} onValueChange={setAgreed}>
  <Text>I agree to the <Link href="/terms">Terms of Service</Link></Text>
</Checkbox>
